summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Timeline Visualizer v3 enhancements. Successfully tested event card modal overlay, config dialog functionality, period drill-down navigation, and breadcrumb system.
passed_tests: Event card opens as centered modal overlay
Event card has proper close button functionality
Config dialog opens via gear icon and has all required fields
Config dialog saves and updates timeline header correctly
Header shows title, date range and description without UI hints
Period drill-down navigation works with breadcrumb system
Breadcrumb navigation back to root timeline
Context events appear dimmed in drilled-in view
Add event form opens when clicking timeline axis
Event card overlay closes when clicking background
Theme toggle button is present and accessible
